arts.ttl: Possible Real Madrid XI for LaLiga EA Sports clash against Getafe
arts.sum: Injuries continue to ravage Real Madrid this season and this continues to be a headache for head coach Carlo Ancelotti, who is forced to select his starting eleven for Sunday’s game against Getafe with six key players out of action: Tchouameni, Vinicius, Camavinga, Alaba, Militao and Carvajal. Up front, Ancelotti will start Brahim on the right, Mbappé on the left and the possibility is high that Rodrygo will go straight into the starting line-up and look to add to his three goals for the 2024-25 LaLiga season .

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid - Getafe? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Real Madrid Getafe will be played on Sunday December 1 at Santiago Bernabeu, with kick off at 10:30 a.m. ET / 7:30 a.m. PT . Form guide for Real Madrid - Getafe
